topic: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

passage.title: A Day with Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)
passage.text: I will eat rice tomorrow. I will be eating food at 8 pm. I will have eaten food by 8 pm. I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm. She will go to work tomorrow. She will be working at 5 pm. She will have finished her work by 5 pm. She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm. They will go to school tomorrow. They will be playing at 3 pm.
passage.hindiTranslation: मैं कल चावल खाऊँगा। 8 बजे मैं खाना खा रहा होऊँगा। 8 बजे तक मैं खाना खा चुका होऊँगा। 8 बजे तक मैं एक घंटे से खा रहा होऊँगा। वह कल काम पर जाएगी। 5 बजे वह काम कर रही होगी। 5 बजे तक वह काम खत्म कर चुकी होगी। 5 बजे तक वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही होगी। वे कल स्कूल जाएंगे। 3 बजे वे खेल रहे होंगे।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I will eat rice..."?
options: She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm.
I will have read this book by 7 pm.
I will be eating food at 8 pm.
I will eat rice tomorrow.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I will eat rice tomorrow."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I will be eating..."?
options: They will go to school tomorrow.
I will have been reading for three hours by 7 pm.
I will have eaten food by 8 pm.
I will be eating food at 8 pm.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: I will be eating food at 8 pm.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I will be eating food at 8 pm."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I will have eaten..."?
options: They will be playing at 3 pm.
He will sing a song next week.
I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm.
I will have eaten food by 8 pm.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: I will have eaten food by 8 pm.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I will have eaten food by 8 pm."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I will have been..."?
options: They will have done their homework by 3 pm.
He will be singing at 6 pm.
She will go to work tomorrow.
I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "She will go to..."?
options: They will have been playing for an hour by 3 pm.
He will have sung the song by 6 pm.
She will be working at 5 pm.
She will go to work tomorrow.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: She will go to work tomorrow.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "She will go to work tomorrow."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "She will be working..."?
options: I will exercise tomorrow morning.
He will have been singing for half an hour by 6 pm.
She will have finished her work by 5 pm.
She will be working at 5 pm.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: She will be working at 5 pm.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "She will be working at 5 pm."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "She will have finished..."?
options: I will be reading at 7 pm.
I will eat rice tomorrow.
She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm.
She will have finished her work by 5 pm.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: She will have finished her work by 5 pm.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "She will have finished her work by 5 pm."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "She will have been..."?
options: I will have read this book by 7 pm.
I will be eating food at 8 pm.
They will go to school tomorrow.
She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm."
